name: section_html_id
label: Section HTML ID
help_text: Unique anchor ID. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (e.g. about-us-company-overview).

name: heading
label: Heading
default: Built for Business, People and Systems impact.

default.title: Business Impact
default.description: We apply domain expertise to solve industry challenges, create cost efficiencies, and reduce risk. We engineer solutions required to deliver measurable impact focused on business growth.

items.text: Relationship intelligence turning transactions and cash flow data into meaningful conversations
Intelligent self-service resolving queries without escalation
Credit decisions from days to hours via EVOQ Underwriting Workbench for all borrowers

default.title: People Impact
default.description: To improve digital experiences we examine the current state, uncover what's causing friction and combine smart technology with human insights to help people make better decisions at the right moments.

items.text: Member intelligence turning life events into proactive, community-focused financial support
Automated member-service resolving common inquiries instantly to focus staff on high-value advice
Shared infrastructure orchestration enabling credit unions to compete with national banks through intelligent scale

default.title: Systems Impact
default.description: We build adaptive systems across AI and legacy platforms that evolve with you. The result is a unified environment for real-time decision-making and continuous optimization.

items.text: Explainable credit decisioning with full Fair Lending compliance
Early warning signals on credits before they become NPLs
End-to-end digital origination with embedded document intelligence
